name: WELLBIZBRANDS.COM
message: [AI generated] WELLBIZBRANDS.COM is the parent company of three health and wellness brands: Elements Massage, Fitness Together and Fit36. They offer various services including therapeutic massage, personalized fitness training, and high-intensity interval training (HIIT). They focus on enhancing people’s lives by providing wellness solutions tailored to individual needs. They operate numerous franchise locations across the U.S.
